zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl於1166年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登時，她的父親Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale51歲，母親Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl44歲。她於1187年與Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1232年8月9日在蘇格蘭培爾布萊爾 阿爾享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl于1166年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登时，她的父亲Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale51岁，母亲Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl44岁。她于1187年与Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1232年8月9日在苏格兰培爾布萊爾 阿爾享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl was born in 1166, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale, was 51 and her mother, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, was 44. She married Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia in 1187, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 August 1232, in Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl est née en 1166, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia en 1187, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1232, à Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Perthshire, Écosse.

Sie hat 1187 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1232 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Comyn Countess Of Athollが1166年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで生まれた時，父Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedaleは51歳，母Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Athollは44歳であった。1187年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでHenry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1232年8月9日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアブレイル アソルで66歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl(이)가 1166년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1187년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1232년 8월 9일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 블레이르 앳홀에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia em 1187, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl родилась в 1166 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia в 1187 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 августа 1232 г. в местности блеир атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

Murió el 9 de agosto de 1232, en Blair Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Perthshire, Scotland.
